name: golang-github-mreiferson-go-httpclient-dev
title: golang-github-mreiferson-go-httpclient-dev
description:
Go HTTP client with timeouts
This Go package provides an HTTP Transport that implements the RoundTripper
interface and can be used as a built in replacement for the standard
library's, providing:
.
* connection timeouts
* request timeouts
.
This is a thin wrapper around http.Transport that sets dial timeouts and uses
Go's internal timer scheduler to call the Go 1.1+ CancelRequest() API.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-mreiferson-go-httpclient-dev because Go HTTP client with timeouts.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-mreiferson-go-httpclient-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-mreiferson-go-httpclient-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-mreiferson-go-httpclient-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
